synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-50005 does not affect running systems
overview: Synopsis: ELSA-2026-50005 does not affect running systems
full_text:
Synopsis: ELSA-2026-50005 does not affect running systems

The recently released UEKR6 5.4.17 on OL7 and OL8, ELSA-2026-50005,
does not fix any security problems relevant to already running
systems. You do not need to take any action to update your systems.

SUPPORT

Ksplice support is available at ksplice-support_ww at oracle.com.
